text.message: Oh sorry I genuinely didn’t see that
I would have much rather done it
gave up on his awful placement lol
brick port with a 3 and a 10 was certainly a choice
Yeh bad one from black tbh
some dudes see a plow and can't resist
do you want brick or not lmao
I think oj is a bigger threat  than me tbh
Yes but you’re a big threat dude
I do but felt it was the best block
he has the same ows I do if not better
But honestly we are don’t have enough road to fight you tho
You have 2 non knight devs too
So who can fight road then?
well black is back so him
you walked back my nb earlier so whateva
But it didn’t cost you? I just didn’t see your message
my brick sat blocked for ages
ima 7 out for the 4th time here
Blue you gotta wake up man
he's saying the reneg on the nb didn't hurt me
Let see who is taking road then
idk what you guys are on about
I had to use a yop to get those roads lol
yall are really fighting the wrong man
And then you take road alonev
I still don't understand this road nonsense
black gets a road for every 9
And win with the 3 devs in hand?
Black connect your roads man or it’s gg
you done doing reds bidding nutzy?
can't believe I got perma blocked at 5 ponts lol
